methodology.unlock_and_claim_amounts: Reconstructed from Stake(account, stakeID, amount); Unlock and Claim events do not emit amount.
methodology.missing_stake_logs_fallback: If an Unlock/Claim referenced a stake without a corresponding Stake log in the fetched history, amount was backfilled from stakes(account, stakeID).amount.
methodology.missing_unlock_or_claim_logs_fallback: Known stakes were reconciled against stakes(account, stakeID).locktime and claimedTime to backfill missing Unlock/Claim history when needed.
